assumptions.name: Honest Majority Network Peers
assumptions.description: At least 2/3 of connected peers relay messages faithfully and do not selectively censor consensus traffic.

assumptions.name: Bounded Message Delay
assumptions.description: Under normal operating conditions, gossip and vote messages arrive within configured timeout bounds.

assumptions.name: Discrete Log Hardness
assumptions.description: Adversaries cannot solve discrete logarithms over the selected curve within practical time.
mitigations: Migration plan for post-quantum signature schemes

assumptions.name: Hash Collision Resistance
assumptions.description: The hash function used for commitments and identifiers remains collision resistant at target security levels.

assumptions.name: RNG Quality for Key Material
assumptions.description: Entropy sources and DRBG behavior produce unpredictable randomness for validator and session keys.

assumptions.name: BFT Threshold f < n/3
assumptions.description: Byzantine voting power stays below one third of total active voting stake.

assumptions.name: Consensus Synchrony Bounds Hold
assumptions.description: Round-trip latency and clock drift stay within bounds required by fast-path consensus timers.

assumptions.name: Validator Liveness
assumptions.description: At least 2/3 of validator voting power remains online and responsive over finalization windows.

assumptions.name: Rust Memory Safety in Critical Components
assumptions.description: Critical execution and consensus code paths remain memory safe under Rust ownership and borrowing guarantees.
mitigations: Code review gate for unsafe patterns

assumptions.name: Third-Party Dependency Audit Coverage
assumptions.description: All security-sensitive dependencies are tracked and audited before production promotion.

assumptions.name: No Unsafe Blocks in Critical Path
assumptions.description: Consensus-critical and state-transition-critical code paths do not depend on Rust unsafe blocks.
mitigations: CI lint to block new unsafe

assumptions.name: Monotonic Time Source
assumptions.description: Node-local monotonic clocks used for timeout scheduling do not regress during runtime.
